title: Portfolio company examples or case studies
claim: Strengthen the angel investing chapter with specific examples of early-stage founders supported.
desiredEvidence: Portfolio company profiles, founder testimonials, or investment case studies
whyItMatters: Would provide concrete examples of the 'unconventional paths' and 'early building' philosophy in action.
targetEffect: Transform the angel investing chapter from philosophical to evidenced with specific outcomes.

title: Inner Journey participant testimonials
claim: Add depth to the transformational impact narrative with participant voices.
desiredEvidence: Founder testimonials, case studies, or before/after narratives from program participants
whyItMatters: The 1000+ lives transformed claim would be strengthened by specific transformation stories.
targetEffect: Provide human dimension to the Inner Journey impact metrics.

title: SGC student project outcomes
claim: Document the entrepreneurial projects launched by SGC students.
desiredEvidence: Student project descriptions, launch announcements, or follow-up interviews
whyItMatters: The DKU article mentions students continuing to build projects; specific examples would strengthen this narrative.
targetEffect: Show concrete entrepreneurial outcomes from the educational program.

title: Code of Love NGO program details
claim: Expand the Code of Love chapter with specific program information and impact metrics.
desiredEvidence: NGO website, program descriptions, impact reports, or beneficiary testimonials
whyItMatters: Currently the Code of Love chapter relies on a single mention in the DKU article; direct organizational documentation would strengthen it significantly.
targetEffect: Elevate Code of Love from a mentioned organization to a fully documented chapter.
